contents: (** A weaker form that only asserts that we can make equivalences into paths with a computation rule (no uniqueness rule). *)

Definition WeakUnivalence :=
  { etop : forall A B, (A <~> B) -> (A = B) &
    forall A B (f : A <~> B), equiv_path A B (etop A B f) = f }.
(** The same thing, stated with an incoherent notion of equivalence but a pointwise equality for the computation rule.  *)

Definition IncoherentWeakUnivalence :=
  { etop : forall A B (f : A -> B) (g : B -> A),
      (f o g == idmap) -> (g o f == idmap) -> (A = B) &
    forall A B f g H K, equiv_path A B (etop A B f g H K) == f }.
(** Finally, it even suffices to consider only just a few special cases. This is due to Ian Orton and Andrew Pitts. *)

goals.conclusion: WeakUnivalence -> Univalence_type
WeakUnivalence -> Univalence_type
forall B : Type, IsEquiv (equiv_path A B)

srapply (contr_retracttype
            (Build_RetractOf _ _
                             (fun Be => (Be.1 ; equiv_path A Be.1 Be.2))
                             (fun Bf => (Bf.1 ; etop A Bf.1 Bf.2))
                             _)).

hypotheses.body:
fun (A B : Type) (f : A <~> B) =>
etop A B f f^-1
  ((fun x : B => eisretr f x) : (fun x : B => f (f^-1 x)) == idmap)
  ((fun x : A => eissect f x) : (fun x : A => f^-1 (f x)) == idmap)
hypotheses.type: forall A B : Type, A <~> B -> A = B

etop A0 B0 f0 f0^-1
  ((fun x : B0 => eisretr f0 x) : (fun x : B0 => f0 (f0^-1 x)) == idmap)
  ((fun x : A0 => eissect f0 x) : (fun x : A0 => f0^-1 (f0 x)) == idmap)

contents: refine (_ @ flip vwu A B (fun a b => f a = b) @ _).

goals.conclusion: {_ : A & Unit} = {a : A & {b : B & f a = b}}
{b : B & {a : A & f a = b}} = {_ : B & Unit}
{_ : A & Unit} = {a : A & {b : B & f a = b}}
Unit = {b : B & f a = b}
{b : B & {a : A & f a = b}} = {_ : B & Unit}
{a : A & f a = b} = Unit

(fun etop : forall A B : Type, A <~> B -> A = B =>
 forall (A B : Type) (f : A <~> B), equiv_path A B (etop A B f) = f)
  (fun (A B : Type) (f : A <~> B) =>
   (unit vwu A @
    ((ap sig
        (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a : A => {b : B & f a = b})
           ((fun a : A =>
             (contract vwu {b : B & f a = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a)))^)
            :
            (fun _ : A => Unit) == (fun a : A => {b : B & f a = b}))) @
      flip vwu A B (fun (a : A) (b : B) => f a = b)) @
     ap sig
       (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a : A & f a = b}) 
          (fun _ : B => Unit)
          ((fun b : B => contract vwu {a : A & f a = b} (istruncmap_fiber b))
           :
           (fun b : B => {a : A & f a = b}) == (fun _ : B => Unit))))) @
   (unit vwu B)^)

(fun etop : forall A B : Type, A <~> B -> A = B =>
 forall (A B : Type) (f : A <~> B), equiv_path A B (etop A B f) = f)
  (fun (A B : Type) (f : A <~> B) =>
   (unit vwu A @
    ((ap sig
        (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a : A => {b : B & f a = b})
           ((fun a : A =>
             (contract vwu {b : B & f a = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a)))^)
            :
            (fun _ : A => Unit) == (fun a : A => {b : B & f a = b}))) @
      flip vwu A B (fun (a : A) (b : B) => f a = b)) @
     ap sig
       (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a : A & f a = b}) 
          (fun _ : B => Unit)
          ((fun b : B => contract vwu {a : A & f a = b} (istruncmap_fiber b))
           :
           (fun b : B => {a : A & f a = b}) == (fun _ : B => Unit))))) @
   (unit vwu B)^)

equiv_path A B
  ((unit vwu A @
    ((ap sig
        (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a : A => {b : B & f a = b})
           (fun a : A =>
            (contract vwu {b : B & f a = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a)))^)) @
      flip vwu A B (fun (a : A) (b : B) => f a = b)) @
     ap sig
       (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a : A & f a = b}) 
          (fun _ : B => Unit)
          (fun b : B => contract vwu {a : A & f a = b} (istruncmap_fiber b))))) @
   (unit vwu B)^) =
f

contents: apply path_equiv, path_arrow; intros a; cbn.

goals.conclusion:
transport idmap
  ((unit vwu A @
    ((ap sig
        (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
           (fun a0 : A =>
            (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^)) @
      flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b)) @
     ap sig
       (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) 
          (fun _ : B => Unit)
          (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b))))) @
   (unit vwu B)^)
  a =
f a

transport idmap (unit vwu B)^
  (transport idmap
     (ap sig
        (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) 
           (fun _ : B => Unit)
           (fun b : B =>
            contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b))))
     (transport idmap (flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b))
        (transport idmap
           (ap sig
              (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit)
                 (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
                 (fun a0 : A =>
                  (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^)))
           (transport idmap (unit vwu A) a)))) =
f a

transport idmap
  (ap sig
     (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) 
        (fun _ : B => Unit)
        (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b))))
  (transport idmap (flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b))
     (transport idmap
        (ap sig
           (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
              (fun a0 : A =>
               (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^)))
        (transport idmap (unit vwu A) a))) =
transport idmap (unit vwu B) (f a)

transport idmap
  (ap sig
     (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) 
        (fun _ : B => Unit)
        (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b))))
  (transport idmap (flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b))
     (transport idmap
        (ap sig
           (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
              (fun a0 : A =>
               (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^)))
        (a; tt))) =
(f a; tt)

transport (fun x : B -> Type => {x0 : _ & x x0})
  (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) (fun _ : B => Unit)
     (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b)))
  (transport idmap (flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b))
     (transport (fun x : A -> Type => {x0 : _ & x x0})
        (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
           (fun a0 : A =>
            (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^))
        (a; tt))) =
(f a; tt)

contents: rewrite (transport_sigma' (C := fun P (a0:A) => P a0)); cbn.

goals.conclusion:
transport (fun x : B -> Type => {x0 : _ & x x0})
  (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) (fun _ : B => Unit)
     (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b)))
  (transport idmap (flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b))
     (a;
     transport (fun x : A -> Type => x a)
       (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
          (fun a0 : A =>
           (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^))
       tt)) =
(f a; tt)

transport idmap (flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b))
  (a;
  transport (fun x : A -> Type => x a)
    (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
       (fun a0 : A =>
        (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^))
    tt) =
?Goal

transport (fun x : B -> Type => {x0 : _ & x x0})
  (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) (fun _ : B => Unit)
     (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b)))
  ?Goal =
(f a; tt)

transport idmap (flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b))
  (a;
  transport (fun x : A -> Type => x a)
    (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
       (fun a0 : A =>
        (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^))
    tt) =
?Goal

transport (fun x : A -> Type => x a)
  (path_arrow (fun _ : A => Unit) (fun a0 : A => {b : B & f a0 = b})
     (fun a0 : A =>
      (contract vwu {b : B & f a0 = b} (contr_basedpaths (f a0)))^))
  tt =
?y

transport (fun x : B -> Type => {x0 : _ & x x0})
  (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) (fun _ : B => Unit)
     (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b)))
  (transport idmap (flip vwu A B (fun (a0 : A) (b : B) => f a0 = b))
     (a; f a; 1)) =
(f a; tt)

transport (fun x : B -> Type => {x0 : _ & x x0})
  (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) (fun _ : B => Unit)
     (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b)))
  (f a; a; 1) =
(f a; tt)

(f a;
transport (fun x : B -> Type => x (f a))
  (path_arrow (fun b : B => {a0 : A & f a0 = b}) (fun _ : B => Unit)
     (fun b : B => contract vwu {a0 : A & f a0 = b} (istruncmap_fiber b)))
  (a; 1)) =
(f a; tt)
